name: Panama Real Estate Sale
description: Main website for Panama real estate - SEO, content, and marketing automation

actions: Write 2000 word guide
Add FAQ schema
Internal links

steps.title: Optimize Homepage Meta Title and Description

payload.title: Optimize Homepage Meta Title and Description
actions: Update the homepage meta title to include primary keyword: Panama Real Estate for Sale
Update meta description to be between 150-160 characters with call to action
Ensure the meta title is under 60 characters
Add Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image) if missing

steps.title: Create Article: Best Beaches in Panama for Expats

payload.title: Create Article: Best Beaches in Panama for Expats
actions: Create a new blog post file under app/[lang]/blog/ concerning the best beaches.
Include target keywords: best beaches in panama, panama beachfront property, expat beaches panama
Include a simple React component returning a styled article with 3 beach recommendations.

steps.title: Optimize Meta Tags for Contact Page

payload.title: Optimize Meta Tags for Contact Page
actions: Export proper Next.js metadata in app/[lang]/contacto/page.tsx
Ensure title includes 'Contact Panama Real Estate Experts'
Add compelling meta description in both English and Spanish

payload.title: Create Panama Golden Visa 2026 Guide
actions: Create a new blog post file under app/[lang]/blog/panama-golden-visa-2026/page.tsx
Include target keywords: panama golden visa 2026, panama investment visa, residency by investment
Write an informative React component detailing the $300k-$500k investment requirements.

payload.title: Implement Dynamic Sitemap
actions: Create or update app/sitemap.ts to dynamically generate a sitemap
Include the homepage, /contacto, and /tours in the sitemap output
Base url should be https://www.panamarealestatesale.com

payload.title: Optimize robots.ts
actions: Update app/robots.ts to allow all crawlers
Ensure the sitemap URL points to https://www.panamarealestatesale.com/sitemap.xml

payload.title: Optimize Tours Page Keywords
actions: Inject the exact keyword 'panama relocation tours' into the H1 or main summary of the tours page
Add structured data or compelling bullet points emphasizing ROI and private access

steps.title: Google Search Console Analysis for panamarealestatesale.com
Panama Real Estate Website SEO Audit

payload.result: The robots.txt file is properly configured, allowing all search engines to crawl the website and specifying the sitemap location.

The sitemap provides a comprehensive overview of the website's content structure, including both English and Spanish versions of the main pages and blog sections. The update frequency and priority levels seem appropriate.
The website has a clear content structure with well-organized pages and blog posts. The English and Spanish versions of the key content are present.
The page titles, meta tags, and schema markup appear to be properly implemented based on the surface-level content review.
The website loads quickly and the content is well-formatted and readable.
The internal linking structure seems adequate, with links between the main pages and blog posts.

steps.title: Content Strategy Failed: Panama Real Estate Sale
steps.description: Error: Request failed with status code 401

steps.title: Fix H1 Tag & Update 2025→2026 Year References on Homepage

payload.issue: H1 tag reads 'PANAMAINVESTMENTS' instead of 'Panama Real Estate for Sale'. Meanwhile 3x H2s and 1x H3 still reference 2025 while the title/meta already say 2026. This mismatch kills freshness signals and the H1 has zero keyword value.
payload.fix: 1) Change H1 from 'PANAMAINVESTMENTS' to 'Panama Real Estate for Sale 2026'. 2) Update all H2/H3 year references: 'Panama Real Estate Market 2025' → '2026', 'The Panama Investment Bible 2025' → '2026'. 3) Verify title and meta description stay aligned.
payload.impact: H1 is the #1 on-page ranking signal. Aligning it with the primary keyword + fixing year inconsistency can move rankings from page 3-4 to page 1 for 'Panama real estate for sale'.
payload.competitor_gap: dopanama.com, casasolution.com, panamaequity.com all have keyword-aligned H1s

steps.result: H1 updated from PANAMAINVESTMENTS to Panama Real Estate for Sale 2026. All 2025 year references updated to 2026 in H2/H3 headings.
